positive: A hyper-detailed, central-composition graphic illustration of a majestic celestial fox spirit (kitsune) rising from a cosmic floral pattern. The fox should have flowing, stylized fur and glowing, ethereal elements. The background is a deep indigo night sky filled with nebula gas clouds, geometric constellations, and blooming bioluminescent sakura flowers. Use a stylized neo-art deco aesthetic combined with ethereal fantasy illustration. Strong contrast between the vibrant magenta and cyan glow of the spirit and the deep navy background. Clean silhouettes, symmetrical composition, suitable for screen printing on apparel, minimalist lines, 8K highly detailed.
